title: Apply Operations to Make All Array Elements Equal to Zero
titleCn: 使数组中的所有元素都等于零

testcases.input: nums = [2,2,3,1,1,0], k = 3 Output: true Explanation: We can do the following operations: - Choose the subarray [2,2,3]. The resulting array will be nums = [1,1,2,1,1,0]. - Choose the subarray [2,1,1]. The resulting array will be nums = [1,1,1,0,0,0]. - Choose the subarray [1,1,1]. The resulting array will be nums = [0,0,0,0,0,0].
testcases.expectedOutput: true Explanation: We can do the following operations: - Choose the subarray [2,2,3]. The resulting array will be nums = [1,1,2,1,1,0]. - Choose the subarray [2,1,1]. The resulting array will be nums = [1,1,1,0,0,0]. - Choose the subarray [1,1,1]. The resulting array will be nums = [0,0,0,0,0,0].

testcases.input: nums = [1,3,1,1], k = 2 Output: false Explanation: It is not possible to make all the array elements equal to 0.
testcases.expectedOutput: false Explanation: It is not possible to make all the array elements equal to 0.
